scripts.build: next build && npx @opennextjs/cloudflare build && cp .open-next/worker.js .open-next/assets/_worker.js && cp -r .open-next/cloudflare .open-next/assets/ && cp -r .open-next/middleware .open-next/assets/ && cp -r .open-next/server-functions .open-next/assets/ && cp -r .open-next/.build .open-next/assets/ && cp -r stays en fr de pl zh it .open-next/assets/ 2>/dev/null; cp *.jpeg *.jpg *.webp *.JPG *.png index.html manifest.json _headers _redirects .open-next/assets/ 2>/dev/null; true
scripts.pages:build: next build && npx @opennextjs/cloudflare build && cp .open-next/worker.js .open-next/assets/_worker.js && cp -r .open-next/cloudflare .open-next/assets/ && cp -r .open-next/middleware .open-next/assets/ && cp -r .open-next/server-functions .open-next/assets/ && cp -r .open-next/.build .open-next/assets/ && cp -r stays en fr de pl zh it .open-next/assets/ 2>/dev/null; cp *.jpeg *.jpg *.webp *.JPG *.png index.html manifest.json _headers _redirects .open-next/assets/ 2>/dev/null; true
scripts.preview: npm run pages:build && wrangler pages dev
scripts.deploy: npm run pages:build && wrangler pages deploy
